_doc: implement-notes config — read by `/implement` Phase 5.5 auto-emit + `implement_notes_gate.py` Stop hook validator. Ships defaults; project can override per-field. Schema v0.18+.
_doc_auto_emit: When true, `/implement <slug>` auto-fires `/implement-notes` after `/verify` completes (Phase 5.5). When false, sidecar emit is fully manual via slash command. Default true.
_doc_output_format: One of `md` | `html` | `both`. `md` = legacy machine-parseable only. `html` = DEV browser-readable only. `both` = ship both files (default, recommended).
_doc_enforce: Stop-hook severity when sidecar missing on done-claim. `warn` (default) = additionalContext nudge. `block` = exit 2 hard-block. Override via `.agent-toolkit/enforce_mode.json` per_hook.implement_notes_gate.
